offer: For accounting firms processing 5–15 clients/month, manual payroll data formatting causes late tax submissions. We automate the formatting instead of manual data entry and formatting.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Participate in forums for accounting tools and resources
try_it: Let users try manual data entry interface on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer onboarding for first 10 early-access users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminders for key tasks
Allow CSV import for existing payroll data
Streamline onboarding process for new users
